unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* allow no more than 5 "chained" compression steps */
/* Comment this out if zlib is always going to be at least ver. 1.2.0.4 (doing so will reduce code size slightly). */
/* bit 0 set: file probably ascii text */
/* bit 3 set: original file name present */

function.name: zalloc_cb
function.parameter_list: (voidpf opaque, unsigned int items, unsigned int size)

function.name: zfree_cb
process_zlib_error
exit_zlib
process_trailer
inflate_stream
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct Curl_cwriter *writer, int type, zlibInitState started)

function.name: deflate_do_init
deflate_do_write
deflate_do_close
gzip_do_init
check_gzip_header
gzip_do_write
gzip_do_close
brotli_map_error
function.block: { switch(be) { case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_EXUBERANT_NIBBLE: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_EXUBERANT_META_NIBBLE: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_SIMPLE_HUFFMAN_ALPHABET: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_SIMPLE_HUFFMAN_SAME: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_CL_SPACE: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_HUFFMAN_SPACE: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_CONTEXT_MAP_REPEAT: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_BLOCK_LENGTH_1: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_BLOCK_LENGTH_2: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_TRANSFORM: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_DICTIONARY: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_WINDOW_BITS: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_PADDING_1: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_FORMAT_PADDING_2: #ifdef BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_COMPOUND_DICTIONARY case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_COMPOUND_DICTIONARY: #endif #ifdef BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_DICTIONARY_NOT_SET case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_DICTIONARY_NOT_SET: #endif case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_INVALID_ARGUMENTS: return CURLE_BAD_CONTENT_ENCODING; case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_CONTEXT_MODES: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_TREE_GROUPS: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_CONTEXT_MAP: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_RING_BUFFER_1: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_RING_BUFFER_2: case BROTLI_DECODER_ERROR_ALLOC_BLOCK_TYPE_TREES: return CURLE_OUT_OF_MEMORY; default: break; } return CURLE_WRITE_ERROR; }

function.name: brotli_do_init
brotli_do_write
brotli_do_close
zstd_do_init
zstd_do_write
zstd_do_close

unit.decl_stmt: static const struct Curl_cwtype * const general_unencoders[] = { &identity_encoding, #ifdef HAVE_LIBZ &deflate_encoding, &gzip_encoding, #endif #ifdef HAVE_BROTLI &brotli_encoding, #endif #ifdef HAVE_ZSTD &zstd_encoding, #endif NULL };
unit.comment: /* supported content decoders only for transfer encodings */
/* Provide a list of comma-separated names of supported encodings. */

function.name: Curl_all_content_encodings
error_do_init
error_do_write
error_do_close

unit.comment: /* Find the content encoding by name. */

function.name: find_unencode_writer

unit.comment: /* Set-up the unencoding stack from the Content-Encoding header value. * See RFC 7231 section 3.1.2.2. */

function.name: Curl_build_unencoding_stack
Curl_build_unencoding_stack
Curl_all_content_encodings
